pages.title: The Races
pages.text: Ten races. Pick one at world creation; the choice is permanent. Every race is passive — no keybound abilities — except Dragonborn, which has a fire-breath cone on cooldown.

pages.title: Aquatic and amphibious
pages.text: $(l:races/tortle)Tortle$(/l). Shelled, slow on land, durable.$(br)$(l:races/ribbit)Ribbit$(/l). Frog-folk. Charged jumps, eats only bugs and fish, slows in cold biomes.$(br)$(l:races/locathah)Locathah$(/l). Fish-folk. Permanent tail, never drowns, weakens on land.

pages.title: Fey, fiend, dragon, beast
pages.text: $(l:races/elf)Elf$(/l). Long-lived, no sleep. Pick a lineage: $(l:races/elf_high)High$(/l), $(l:races/elf_wood)Wood$(/l), $(l:races/elf_sea)Sea$(/l).$(br)$(l:races/aarakocra)Aarakocra$(/l). Bird-folk. Flies with equipped wings; heavy armor grounds you.$(br)$(l:races/tiefling)Tiefling$(/l). Fiend-blooded. Fire-immune, water-vulnerable, spawns in the Nether.$(br)$(l:races/dragonborn)Dragonborn$(/l). Scaled. Active fire-breath cone on a 15-second cooldown.

pages.title: Mortal stock
pages.text: $(l:races/half_orc)Half-Orc$(/l). Brawny. +1 melee, near-death recovery, dull at magic.$(br)$(l:races/dwarf)Dwarf$(/l). Stout. Stone-mining specialist, full darkvision, sinks in water.$(br)$(l:races/human)Human$(/l). No innate traits, no drawbacks. Pick one of seven boons at world entry.
